key.name: indicator-mode
key.summary: Where the indicator appears: panel, tray or quick-settings

key.name: show-battery-text
key.summary: Show battery percentage next to the indicator icon

key.name: show-panel-label
key.summary: Show the device name on the panel button

key.name: show-when-disconnected
key.summary: Always show the indicator even when no Moto Buds+ is connected

key.name: devices
key.summary: Per-device persisted state as JSON objects
